div.head: 139. Memorandum From the President’s Assistant for National Security Affairs (Clark) to President ReaganSource: Reagan Library, Guhin, Michael A.: Files, 01/20/1982–01/22/1982. Secret. A stamped notation on the document reads: “The President has seen.”

list.head: SUBJECT
list.item: Decision Directive and Public Statement on US Law of the Sea Policy

div.p: As directed at the January 21 NSC meeting on this subject,See Document 138. we have prepared a decision directive (Tab A)Tab A, not attached, is printed in Document 140. and public statement (Tab B).Not attached. See Public Papers: Reagan, 1982, Book I, p. 92. These reflect your decisions and the agreement in that meeting. State concurs. Aram Bakshian concurs in the statement.

We should issue the directive and release the statement as early in the week of January 25 as possible. We will background the statement with Jim Malone, your Special Representative for Law of the Sea. Key capitals have been advised to expect a favorable announcement shortly.
That you approve and sign the National Security Decision Directive (Tab A) and approve release of the Presidential statement (Tab B).The President checked and initialed the approve option.
